qualifiers.espnText: Lineups are announced and players are warming up.

events.description: 首发阵容公布，球员热身。

qualifiers.espnText: First Half begins.

relatedPlayer.name: 马库斯·霍姆格伦·佩德森

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt blocked. Erling Haaland (Norway) header from the centre of the box is blocked. Assisted by Marcus Pedersen with a cross.

events.description: 哈兰德射门被封堵。 马库斯·霍姆格伦·佩德森参与进攻。

player.name: 马库斯·霍姆格伦·佩德森

qualifiers.espnText: Offside, Norway. Alexander Sørloth is caught offside.
Antonio Nusa (Norway) wins a free kick in the defensive half.
Attempt missed. Yan Diomande (Côte d'Ivoire) header from the centre of the box misses to the left. Assisted by Guéla Doué with a cross.

events.description: 扬·迪奥曼德射门偏出。 古拉·杜埃参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Corner, Côte d'Ivoire. Conceded by Torbjørn Heggem.
Foul by David Møller Wolfe (Norway).
Corner, Côte d'Ivoire. Conceded by Kristoffer Ajer.
Attempt missed. Ghislain Konan (Côte d'Ivoire) right footed shot from the left side of the box is close, but misses to the left. Assisted by Christ Inao Oulaï.

events.description: 吉斯兰·科南射门偏出。 基督·伊瑙·欧莱参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Corner, Norway. Conceded by Guéla Doué.
Foul by David Møller Wolfe (Norway).
Delay in match for a drinks break.
Delay over. They are ready to continue.
Attempt missed. Nicolas Pépé (Côte d'Ivoire) right footed shot from the right side of the six yard box misses to the left. Assisted by Yan Diomande with a cross.

events.description: 尼古拉·佩佩射门偏出。 扬·迪奥曼德参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Corner, Côte d'Ivoire. Conceded by Kristoffer Ajer.
Corner, Côte d'Ivoire. Conceded by Marcus Pedersen.
Corner, Côte d'Ivoire. Conceded by Erling Haaland.
Corner, Côte d'Ivoire. Conceded by Torbjørn Heggem.
Corner, Côte d'Ivoire. Conceded by Patrick Berg.
Attempt saved. Emmanuel Agbadou (Côte d'Ivoire) right footed shot from outside the box is saved in the top centre of the goal by Ørjan Nyland (Norway).
Attempt saved. Erling Haaland (Norway) header from the centre of the box is saved in the bottom left corner by Yahia Fofana (Côte d'Ivoire). Assisted by Alexander Sørloth with a cross.

events.description: 哈兰德射正。 亚历山大·索罗斯参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Foul by Alexander Sørloth (Norway).
Attempt blocked. Martin Ødegaard (Norway) left footed shot from outside the box is blocked. Assisted by Antonio Nusa.

events.description: 厄德高射门被封堵。 安东尼奥·努萨参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Goal! Côte d'Ivoire 0, Norway 1. Antonio Nusa (Norway) right footed shot from the left side of the box to the top right corner. Assisted by Martin Ødegaard.

events.description: 安东尼奥·努萨破门。 比分 0-1。

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt blocked. Erling Haaland (Norway) left footed shot from very close range is blocked.

events.description: 哈兰德射门被封堵。 亚历山大·索罗斯参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Corner, Norway. Conceded by Ibrahim Sangaré.
Attempt missed. Alexander Sørloth (Norway) header from very close range is close, but misses to the right. Assisted by Patrick Berg with a cross following a corner.

events.description: 亚历山大·索罗斯射门偏出。 帕特里克·伯格参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Corner, Côte d'Ivoire. Conceded by Marcus Pedersen.

events.description: 第四官员示意补时4分钟。

qualifiers.espnText: Second Half begins Côte d'Ivoire 0, Norway 1.

Foul by Antonio Nusa (Norway).
Antonio Nusa (Norway) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.

events.description: 安东尼奥·努萨吃到黄牌。

player.name: 马库斯·霍姆格伦·佩德森
